items.ja: Hillsborough survivors 'appalled' by Grok AI posts
items.en: Hillsborough survivors 'appalled' by Grok AI posts
items.text_for_match: Hillsborough survivors 'appalled' by Grok AI posts Posts generated by Grok repeated debunked lies about the cause of 1989 disaster, which claimed 97 lives. Posts generated by Grok repeated debunked lies about the cause of 1989 disaster, which claimed 97 lives.

items.ja: Wales want Phillips to join World Cup campaign
items.en: Wales want Phillips to join World Cup campaign

items.ja: Will Wolves pull off the Premier League's greatest escape?
items.en: Will Wolves pull off the Premier League's greatest escape?
items.text_for_match: Will Wolves pull off the Premier League's greatest escape? Wolves are bottom of the Premier League, 12 points off safety. items.ja: Masked fan unplugs VAR monitor in German second division match
items.en: Masked fan unplugs VAR monitor in German second division match
items.text_for_match: Masked fan unplugs VAR monitor in German second division match A masked fan unplugged a VAR monitor in a German second division match as the referee went to the pitchside screen to check a penalty award.
